com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.pinentry

Interface ExtPINEntry

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface ExtPINEntry
extends Module
    [External Module] Provides the ability for online/offline PIN entry.

    How to get this module:

         ExtPINEntry extPINEntry = (ExtPINEntry)ExtNSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.EXT_PIN_ENTRY);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void cancelPINEntry()
      Cancels PIN entry.
      void startOfflinePINEntry(Key key, java.lang.String panInfo, int timeout, ExtPINEntryParameters offlinePinInputParameter, ExtPINEntryListener listener)
      Starts offline PIN entry.
      void startOfflinePINEntry(RSAKey rsaKey, int timeout, ExtPINEntryParameters pinEntryParameters, ExtPINEntryListener listener)
      Starts offline PIN entry process.
      void startOnlinePINEntry(Key key, CipherPAN cipherPAN, int timeout, ExtPINEntryParameters pinInputParameter, ExtPINEntryListener listener)
      Starts online PIN entry.
      void startOnlinePINEntry(Key key, java.lang.String panInfo, int timeout, ExtPINEntryParameters pinEntryParameters, ExtPINEntryListener listener)
      Starts online PIN entry.

    • Method Detail

      • startOnlinePINEntry

        void startOnlinePINEntry(Key key,
                         java.lang.String panInfo,
                         int timeout,
                         ExtPINEntryParameters pinEntryParameters,
                         ExtPINEntryListener listener)
                  throws NSDKException
        Starts online PIN entry.

        Example:

             try {
         SymmetricKey pinKey = new SymmetricKey();
         pinKey.setKeyID(pinKeyIndex);
         pinKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);

         String pan = "6214050711033116";
         int timeout = 60;

         ExtPINEntryParameters parameter = new ExtPINEntryParameters();
         parameter.setMaxPINLen((byte) 6);
         parameter.setMaskLine(ExtPINMaskLine.LINE_4);
         parameter.setDisplayMessages(new String[]{"Input online pin"});
         parameter.setPINBlockMode(PINBlockMode.ISO9564_0);
         parameter.setAutoComplete(true);

         extPINEntry.startOnlinePINEntry(pinKey, pan, timeout, parameter, new ExtPINEntryListener() {

             @Override
             public void onOnlineSuccess(int pinLen, byte[] pinBlock, byte[] dukptKsn) {
                 // Do something when online PIN input success.
             }

             @Override
             public void onOfflineSuccess(int pinLen, byte[] pinBlock, byte[] randomKey) {
                 // Do something when offline PIN input success.
             }

             @Override
             public void onError(int errorCode, String msg) {
                 // Do something when error.
             }

             @Override
             public void onTimeout() {
                 // Do something when timeout.
             }

             @Override
             public void onCancel() {
                 // Do something when cancelled.
             }
         });
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the error.
     }
        Parameters:
        key - [Required] PIN key used to encrypt PIN.
        • Key ID
        • Key type
        • Key usage: If using DUKPT to encrypt PIN, set key usage to KeyUsage.DUKPT
        panInfo - [Required] Plain PAN or Hash value of PAN which will be used to calculate PIN block.
        timeout - [Required] Timeout between key presses. Unit: second.
        pinEntryParameters - [Required] Parameters for online PIN entry.
        • ExtPINEntryParameters is for normal use.
        • ExtOnlinePINParameters provides reserved parameters.
        listener - [Required] Listens to the result of PIN entry. See ExtPINEntryListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • startOnlinePINEntry

        void startOnlinePINEntry(Key key,
                         CipherPAN cipherPAN,
                         int timeout,
                         ExtPINEntryParameters pinInputParameter,
                         ExtPINEntryListener listener)
                  throws NSDKException
        Starts online PIN entry.

        Example:

             try {
         SymmetricKey pinKey = new SymmetricKey();
         pinKey.setKeyID(pinKeyIndex);
         pinKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);

         int timeout = 60;

         SymmetricKey panKey = new SymmetricKey();
         panKey.setKeyID(trackKeyIndex);
         panKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);

         CipherPAN cipherPAN = new CipherPAN();
         cipherPAN.setPANKey(panKey);
         cipherPAN.setCipherPAN(ISOUtils.hex2byte("86BEC8567FDD69F104063642C76CFEC4"));

         ExtPINEntryParameters parameter = new ExtPINEntryParameters();
         parameter.setMaxPINLen((byte) 6);
         parameter.setMaskLine(ExtPINMaskLine.LINE_4);
         parameter.setDisplayMessages(new String[]{"Input online pin"});
         parameter.setPINBlockMode(PINBlockMode.ISO9564_0);
         parameter.setAutoComplete(true);

         extPINEntry.startOnlinePINEntry(pinKey, cipherPAN, timeout, parameter, new ExtPINEntryListener() {

             @Override
             public void onOnlineSuccess(int pinLen, byte[] pinBlock, byte[] dukptKsn) {
                 // Do something when online PIN input success.
             }

             @Override
             public void onOfflineSuccess(int pinLen, byte[] pinBlock, byte[] randomKey) {
                 // Do something when offline PIN input success.
             }

             @Override
             public void onError(int errorCode, String msg) {
                 // Do something when error.
             }

             @Override
             public void onTimeout() {
                 // Do something when timeout.
             }

             @Override
             public void onCancel() {
                 // Do something when cancelled.
             }
         });
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the error.
     }
        Parameters:
        key - [Required] PIN key used to encrypt PIN, only SymmetricKey or AsymmetricKey is allowed.
        cipherPAN - [Required] Cipher PAN which is encrypted by PAN key, see CipherPAN. The pan will be used to calculate the pin block.
        timeout - [Required] Timeout between key presses. Unit: second.
        pinInputParameter - [Required] Parameters for online PIN entry.
        • ExtPINEntryParameters is for normal use.
        • ExtOnlinePINParameters provides reserved parameters.
        listener - [Required] Listens to the result of PIN entry. See ExtPINEntryListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • startOfflinePINEntry

        void startOfflinePINEntry(Key key,
                          java.lang.String panInfo,
                          int timeout,
                          ExtPINEntryParameters offlinePinInputParameter,
                          ExtPINEntryListener listener)
                   throws NSDKException
        Starts offline PIN entry.

        Note: This only requests to enter PIN, it will not verify offline PIN.

        Example:

             ExtPINEntryListener listener = new ExtPINEntryListener() {
         @Override
         public void onOnlineSuccess(int pinLen, byte[] pinBlock, byte[] dukptKSN) {
             // Do something when online PIN input success.
         }

         @Override
         public void onOfflineSuccess(int pinLen, byte[] pinBlock, byte[] randomKey) {
             // Do something when offline PIN input success.
             // When random protect mode is set to true, random key will be returned. It is encrypted by the specified master key.
         }

         @Override
         public void onError(int errorCode, String msg) {
             // Do something when error.
         }

         @Override
         public void onTimeout() {
             // Do something when timeout.
         }

         @Override
         public void onCancel() {
             // Do something when cancelled.
         }
     }

     // Case 1: Normal offline PIN entry
     try {
         ExtPINEntryParameters parameter = new ExtPINEntryParameters();
         parameter.setMaxPINLen((byte) 6);
         parameter.setMaskLine(ExtPINMaskLine.LINE_4);
         parameter.setDisplayMessages(new String[]{"Input offline pin"});
         parameter.setPINBlockMode(PINBlockMode.ISO9564_0);
         parameter.setAutoComplete(true);

         SymmetricKey pinKey = new SymmetricKey();
         pinKey.setKeyID(pinKeyIndex);
         pinKey.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);

         String pan = "6214050711033116";

         int timeout = 60;

         extPINEntry.startOfflinePINEntry(pinKey, timeout, pan, parameter, listener);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the error.
     }

     // Case 2: Offline PIN entry using random key
     try {
         ExtOfflinePINParameters parameter = new ExtOfflinePINParameters();
         parameter.setMaxPINLen((byte) 6);
         parameter.setMaskLine(ExtPINMaskLine.LINE_4);
         parameter.setDisplayMessages(new String[]{"Input offline pin"});
         parameter.setPINBlockMode(PINBlockMode.ISO9564_0);
         parameter.setAutoComplete(true);
         parameter.setRandomProtectMode(true);

         // The key used to protect random key.
         SymmetricKey key = new SymmetricKey();
         key.setKeyID(masterKeyIndex);
         key.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);

         String pan = "6214050711033116";

         extPINEntry.startOfflinePINEntry(key, pan, timeout, parameter, listener);
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the error.
     }
        Parameters:
        key - [Required] This could be PIN key or protection key which is used to generate random key when set ExtOfflinePINParameters.setRandomProtectMode(boolean) to true.
        panInfo - [Required] Plain PAN or hash value of PAN which will be used to calculate PIN block.
        timeout - [Required] Timeout between key presses. Unit: second.
        offlinePinInputParameter - [Required] Parameters for online PIN entry.
        • ExtPINEntryParameters is for normal use.
        • ExtOfflinePINParameters provides more parameters for offline PIN entry.
        listener - [Required] Listens to the result of PIN entry. See ExtPINEntryListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • startOfflinePINEntry

        void startOfflinePINEntry(RSAKey rsaKey,
                          int timeout,
                          ExtPINEntryParameters pinEntryParameters,
                          ExtPINEntryListener listener)
                   throws NSDKException
        Starts offline PIN entry process.

        Note: This is used to initiates an offline PIN entry process on the pin-pad.

        Parameters:
        rsaKey - [Optional] RSA key. This is required for cipher PIN, otherwise it can be set to null. See RSAKey.
        timeout - [Required] Timeout. Unit: second. Value range: [5, 200]
        pinEntryParameters - [Required] PIN entry parameters. In this instruct, only two object is valid in ExtPINEntryParameters.
        • maxPINLen: The maximum pin entry length, value range: [4, 12]
        • displayMessages: The messages to be shown on the pin-pad.
        listener - [Required] Listen to PIN events. See ExtPINEntryListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • cancelPINEntry

        void cancelPINEntry()
             throws NSDKException
        Cancels PIN entry.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
